name: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Process Spawned
notes: This Building Block is used to track abnormal processes spawned.
bb_references: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Process Spawned on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
BB:BehaviourDefinition: Linux Shell Spawned by a Process
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviourDefinition: Linux Shell Spawned by a Process, BB:BehaviourDefinition: Process Spawned by Utility
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Process Spawned on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviourDefinition: Linux Shell Spawned by a Process, BB:BehaviourDefinition: Process Spawned by Utility
